trans-unit.source: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.
trans-unit.target: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.

trans-unit.source: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.
trans-unit.target: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.

trans-unit.source: {0} suggests adding {1}.
trans-unit.target: {0} suggests adding {1}.

trans-unit.source: The request contains an invalid argument.
trans-unit.target: The request contains an invalid argument.

trans-unit.source: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.
trans-unit.target: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.

trans-unit.source: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.
trans-unit.target: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.

trans-unit.source: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.
trans-unit.target: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: You do not have permission to perform this action.

trans-unit.source: The requested resource was not found.
trans-unit.target: The requested resource was not found.

trans-unit.source: The resource already exists.
trans-unit.target: The resource already exists.

trans-unit.source: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.
trans-unit.target: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.

trans-unit.source: One or more validation errors occurred.
trans-unit.target: One or more validation errors occurred.

trans-unit.source: Resource name is required.
trans-unit.target: Resource name is required.

trans-unit.source: Rate limit exceeded.
trans-unit.target: Rate limit exceeded.

trans-unit.source: Invalid request payload.
trans-unit.target: Invalid request payload.

trans-unit.source: Cross-parent reading is not supported for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Cross-parent reading is not supported for this resource.

trans-unit.source: Resource '{0}' not found.
trans-unit.target: Resource '{0}' not found.

trans-unit.source: The page token is invalid or has expired.
trans-unit.target: The page token is invalid or has expired.

trans-unit.source: The filter expression is malformed.
trans-unit.target: The filter expression is malformed.

trans-unit.source: The order_by expression is malformed.
trans-unit.target: The order_by expression is malformed.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred.
